Seamless Publishing Workflow

Our researchers publish directly to our Substack account, and papers automatically appear on apcresearch.org

1. Write Paper

Draft your research.

2. Publish on Substack

Publish to our publication.

3. Auto-Sync

Webhook integration syncs data.

4. Live on Website

Appears on apcresearch.org

Submit via Substack

Research Subteams

Discover the specialized focus areas driving our applied research initiatives.

Wastewater Solutions

Addressing industrial pollution using nanobubbles and advanced oxidation.

Learn More →

Nanofibers via Electrospinning

Synthesizing polymer nanofibers for biomedical and filtration applications.

Learn More →

Nano-Petro for Oil Extraction

Deploying nanofluids for enhanced oil recovery (EOR) and reservoir simulation.

Learn More →

Low-Dimensional Materials

Exploring 2D materials like graphene and MoS₂ for next-gen electronics.

Learn More →

Stay Informed

Curated resources for the latest in nanotechnology and scientific research

PhysOrg

Latest news and articles on physics, astronomy, and other sciences.

SciTechDaily
Nano Werk
Science Daily
AZO Nano
PatentPC

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about APC Research.

We welcome researchers, graduate students, and collaborators passionate about nanotechnology. Please contact us through our email at apc@nano.id with your CV and research interests. We typically recruit during academic semesters and for specific project openings.
Yes! We actively collaborate with universities and supervise graduate thesis research. Both Master's and PhD students can conduct research under our guidance. Contact our team leads to discuss potential thesis topics aligned with our research subteams.
Nano Center Indonesia houses multiple specialized research groups beyond APC, including teams focused on nanomedicine, energy storage, catalysis, and advanced materials characterization. Visit the main NCI website for a complete list of research divisions.
All our publications are available through our Publications page, ResearchGate profile, and our Substack account. Most papers are open-access, and we encourage knowledge sharing within the scientific community.
Absolutely! We actively seek partnerships with industry for applied research, technology transfer, and commercialization. Contact us to discuss collaboration opportunities, joint projects, or technology licensing.
We have state-of-the-art facilities including electron microscopes, electrospinning systems, clean rooms, and advanced characterization tools. Our equipment supports research from material synthesis to device fabrication and testing.

APC Research

Nano Center Indonesia

Applied Physics & Chemistry Research Group at Nano Center Indonesia, advancing nanotechnology for a better world.

Gd. Nanoplex, Jl. Raya Puspiptek A12, Tangerang Selatan, Banten 15314, Indonesia
